skills.name: backtest-strategy-lab
skills.summary: Author or select one parameterized Pine hypothesis through TradeCLI's high-level loader, verify its compiled inputs, and run an approval-gated durable backtest.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: backtest-fast-sweep
skills.summary: Build, immutably plan, approve, run, resume, and inspect durable TradingView-only sweeps for the compiled current-chart strategy.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: investment-committee
skills.summary: Evaluate one Indian-listed equity through independently sourced market, fundamentals, news, bull, bear, trader, and risk-chair stages without trading.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: screener-conviction-workflow
skills.summary: Run reproducible Indian-market screens, validate survivors with current TradingView evidence, and route research cards to cash, MIS, MTF-style, futures, options, or index desks without trading.

skills.name: hedge-fund-ceo-daily-office
skills.summary: Run one Hedge Fund CEO office tick: read authoritative book and roster state, route bounded desk tasks, allocate paper-risk envelopes, collect reports, and record the plan.

skills.name: hedge-fund-short-mis-desk
skills.summary: Trade the paper Short MIS desk for intraday bearish equity setups, with same-day exits and AITradingOffice fund-book journaling.

skills.name: hedge-fund-long-mis-desk

skills.name: hedge-fund-long-mtf-desk
skills.summary: Run the paper Long MTF desk for multi-day long equity trades using fund capital, technical/fundamental checks, stops, and thesis records.

skills.name: hedge-fund-investor-desk

skills.name: hedge-fund-option-index-desk
skills.summary: Trade paper index options as single-leg long calls or puts using supported contract, greek, premium, spread, risk, and office evidence; keep short or multi-leg structures analysis-only.

skills.name: hedge-fund-option-stock-desk
skills.summary: Trade paper single-stock options as single-leg long calls or puts with event-aware contract selection, supported greeks, spread checks, deterministic sizing, and office records.

skills.name: hedge-fund-commodity-desk
skills.summary: Trade supported paper commodity futures after resolving the exact MCX/NCDEX contract, venue, session, liquidity, fund exposure, and macro risk; keep commodity options analysis-only.

skills.name: hedge-fund-stock-futures-desk
skills.summary: Trade paper Indian single-stock futures using resolved dated contracts, trend, liquidity, notional/stop exposure, deterministic sizing, and fund-risk checks without claiming OI or margin accounting.
skills.author: TradingSandbox

skills.name: hedge-fund-skill-improvement-review
skills.summary: Review daily hedge-fund AITradingOffice records, trades, P&L, desk reports, and workflow logs to produce concrete rule and skill-improvement actions.
